zh.Cotton, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可科頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lawrence Greene於1524年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Thomas Norton24歲，母親Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer22歲。他於1558年與Margaret Spencer在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他在英國倫敦被列為cutler。他去世於1580年10月25日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾帕文哈姆享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lawrence Greene于1524年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲Thomas Norton24岁，母亲Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer22岁。他于1558年与Margaret Spencer在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他在英国倫敦被列为cutler。他去世于1580年10月25日在英国英格兰貝德福爾帕文哈姆享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Greene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Green  . In North America, this surname has assimilated cognates from other languages.

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Lawrence Greene was born in 1524, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Thomas Norton, was 24 and his mother, Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, was 22. He married Margaret Spencer in 1558, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. His occupation is listed as cutler in London, England. He died on 25 October 1580, in Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lawrence Greene est né en 1524, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Norton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Spencer en 1558, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est cutler à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1580, à Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lawrence Greene 1524 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Norton 24 und seine Mutter Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer 22. Er hat 1558 in London, England Margaret Spencer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als cutler in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1580 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence Greene è nato il nel 1524 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Norton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Spencer nel 1558, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come cutler nel London, England. Morì il 25 ottobre 1580, nel Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lawrence Greeneが1524年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Nortonは24歳，母Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimerは22歳であった。1558年にイギリスロンドンでMargaret Spencerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。イギリスロンドンでの職業はcutlerと記録されている。彼は1580年10月25日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアプエイベンハムで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence Greene(이)가 1524년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Norton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1558년 영국 런던에서 Margaret Spencer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 cutler이었다. 그는 1580년 10월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 파븐함에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence Greene nasceu em 1524, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Norton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Spencer em 1558, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como cutler em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1580, em Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lawrence Greene родился в 1524 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Norton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Spencer в 1558 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери.  Он работал по профессии cutler в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер 25 октября 1580 г. в местности павенам, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lawrence Greene nació en 1524, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Norton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Spencer en 1558, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era cutler en London, Inglaterra. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1580, en Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
